source.name: Lab 2.1: Exploring the Actions Folder - class inheritance
source.instructions: **What must every custom action class inherit from?**
source.learningObjectives: SWBAT identify that custom action classes must inherit from Action
source.guidance: Every custom action must be a Python class that inherits from `Action` (from rasa_sdk). The `CollectingDispatcher` and `Tracker` are passed into the `run()` method; they are not the base class. `rasa_sdk` is the package name, not a class.
